brand_entity.name: Optimizely
brand_entity.one_line: Optimizely is a digital experience platform that provides specialized tools for A/B testing, experimentation, content management, and B2B commerce.

filtered_signals.title: Optimizely or other LP testing tool?
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: Directly asks for a comparison of the Optimizely platform against other landing page testing tools for tracking results.
verbatim_quotes: For landing page testing, do you prefer Optimizely to track results or another tool and why?

filtered_signals.title: "Development friendly Commerce"
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: A customer review specifically discussing the utility of the Optimizely Configured Commerce manager for product teams.
verbatim_quotes: Built in commerce manager is a huge help for both product managers and developers

filtered_signals.title: "How Optimizely CC Transformed Our B2B (With Some Tweaks)"
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: Detailed feedback on Optimizely's capability in handling complex B2B workflows and product configurations.
verbatim_quotes: how this platform truly understands complex B2B needs
handles our intricate product configurations and bulk ordering workflows effortlessly

filtered_signals.title: "great team of experts"
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: Review confirming the comprehensiveness of features within the Optimizely platform.
verbatim_quotes: Their platform is very comprehensive and they offer a wide array of features.

filtered_signals.title: "Website design tool of great value"
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: Critically assesses the tool's impact on digital experience and conversion rates vs the cost of implementation.
verbatim_quotes: Not only does It optimize the digital experience for online shoppers but also it enhances personalization with ease & improves the conversion rate.

filtered_signals.title: "Best service"
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: General customer satisfaction with the reliability and results of the Optimizely product.
verbatim_quotes: It's a reliable product which gives you desired results.

filtered_signals.title: "Review on Optimizely"
filtered_signals.author_meta: Verified User in Marketing and Advertising
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: Highlights the unified nature of the platform for content and personalization.

filtered_signals.title: "G2, Optimizely configured support e commerce platforms with so many features"
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: Focuses on the setup speed and responsiveness of the Optimizely account and support teams.
verbatim_quotes: Configured Commerce is quick to set up and customer support is quick to reply

filtered_signals.title: "Smooth and ease"
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: Describes the user experience of the e-commerce platform specifically.
verbatim_quotes: Really empathetic and smooth e-commerce platform

filtered_signals.title: "Very Quality Product that continues to evolve"
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: Assesses the solid foundation of the product while noting specific UI challenges.
verbatim_quotes: The foundation is very solid and meets our needs.
There are still just a few UI experiences that aren't the most user friendly.

filtered_signals.title: "One of the best B2B commerce cloud framework."
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: Reviewer emphasizes ease of customization and content editing within the framework.
verbatim_quotes: I like its easy customization, easy upgrade and easy content editing.
